description_long: This is a modern main battle tank with a low-profile, angular turret and a long, prominent main cannon extending from the front. The hull and turret are covered in a digital camouflage pattern of green, tan, and brown, with red accent panels along the turret sides. The tank features wide, reinforced tracks with multiple road wheels on each side, providing stability and traction. The upper surfaces and turret are clad in thick, sloped armor plating, and there are visible hatches and modular panels on the turret and hull. The vehicle's design suggests heavy protection and firepower, suitable for urban and battlefield environments.
description: A heavily armored main battle tank with digital camouflage, a long main cannon, and reinforced tracks, featuring red accent panels and modular armor.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tank's sloped frontal armor, wide tracks, and the main cannon centered above the hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the main cannon, the angular turret with red panels, and the full track assembly.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, exhaust grilles, and the symmetrical arrangement of the tracks and turret.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the main cannon, turret details, and track system.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret roof; no other visible weapon mounts or hardpoints.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; modular panels and reinforced sections are visible, especially on the turret sides and front.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern in olive green, tan, and brown with angular, pixelated shapes.
